query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] Stage 3b Wave 1 — spawning three parallel implementation agents.
[tool: Bash(git add product/features/crt-033/ && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
pseudocode: crt-033 component design + test plans (#45) → [feature/crt-033 479b506] pseudocode: crt-033 component design + test plans (#453)
 16 files changed, 3029 insertions(+)
 create mode 100644 product/features/crt-033/agents/crt-033-agent-1-pseudocode-report.md
 create mode 100644 product/features/crt-033/agents/crt-033-agent-2-testplan-report.md
 cr]
[Assistant] Committing Stage 3a artifacts, then Wave 1.
[tool: mcp__unimatrix__context_cycle(phase-end) → Acknowledged: phase_ended for topic 'crt-033'. Attribution is applied via the hook path (fire-and-forget). Use context_cycle_review to confirm session attribution.]
[Assistant] Gate 3a PASS. Two advisory WARNs for the delivery agent: use `i64` for `computed_at` (architecture is authoritative), and R-04 scenario 4 testing follows architecture's `get_cycle_review()` discriminator.
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: ADR-004 col-023: Wave-Based Refactor Plan for HookType Blast Radius
Design agents write to main repo paths when researcher artifacts show main-repo working directory
Moving a pre-loop extraction block when inserting a new pipeline step in search.rs
ADR-002 nan-005: Documentation Step Placement -- Before /review-pr, Within Feature PR
Batch bugfix sessions must establish a clean worktree from main before spawning work agents
